function.name: meta.definition.function.redscript
function.end: (?<=\})|$(?# functions in protocol declarations or generated interfaces have no body)

function-initializer.name: meta.definition.function.initializer.redscript
function-initializer.begin: (?<!\.)\b(init[?!]*(?# only one is valid, but we want the in⇥ snippet to produce something that looks good))\s*(?=\(|<)

generic-parameter-clause.name: meta.generic-parameter-clause.redscript
generic-parameter-clause.end: >|(?=[^\w\d:<>\s,=&`])(?# characters besides these are never valid in a generic param list -- even if it's not really a valid clause, we should stop trying to parse it if we see one of them.)

protocol-initializer.name: meta.definition.function.initializer.redscript
protocol-initializer.begin: (?<!\.)\b(init[?!]*(?# only one is valid, but we want the in⇥ snippet to produce something that looks good))\s*(?=\(|<)
